title: NeuralTrust Alerting & Monitoring
description: NeuralTrust Alerting & Monitoring enables real-time monitoring of LLM systems and agents with configurable alerts that detect anomalies, policy violations, and performance issues, allowing teams to respond quickly and maintain reliability, safety, and compliance.

items: Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
